appSubtitle: Organize your projects with clarity and simplicity
projectText: Structure your ideas into organized projects
taskText: Integrated task lists with smart tagging for better organization
noteText: Capture thoughts with personalized notes and intelligent tagging
graphText: Track progress with insightful statistics and personalized charts
styleText: Clean, intuitive design that gets out of your way
syncText: Seamlessly synced across all your Apple devices

futureFeatures.linksAndFilesText: Keep everything together in one place, within your projects
futureFeatures.voiceNotesText: Capture ideas instantly when you're on the go

gcuSection.intro: By using the Keepio app, you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before using the app.
gcuSection.accessText: The app is available for download on the App Store for iOS devices. Basic features are free to use without creating an account.
gcuSection.premiumIntro: Keepio offers optional premium features through auto-renewable subscriptions:
premiumFeatures: Keepio Premium Monthly: Access to all premium features for one month
Keepio Premium Yearly: Access to all premium features for one year at a discounted rate
premiumBillingList: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase
Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period
You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your App Store account settings after purchase
Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription
gcuSection.intellectualText: All content, source code, designs, and visuals in Keepio are the exclusive property of the developer. Any unauthorized reproduction, modification, or distribution is strictly prohibited.
prohibitedList: Decompile, reverse engineer, or modify the app
Use the app for any illegal, harmful, or unauthorized purposes
Attempt to access another user's data or interfere with the app's functionality
gcuSection.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for:
liabilityList: Data loss due to iCloud synchronization issues or device failures
App malfunctions, interruptions, or temporary unavailability
Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app
gcuSection.modificationsText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
gcuSection.lawText: These terms are governed by French law. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in France.
gcuSection.contactText: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at: contact{'@'}keepio.fr or use the contact form on our website.

privacySection.title: Privacy Policy
privacySection.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Keepio collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacySection.dataCollectedIntro: Keepio does not collect any personally identifiable information (name, email, etc.). The app only stores:
dataCollectedList: Content you create: projects, tasks, notes, and tags
Metadata: creation dates, progress status, and organizational settings
privacySection.storageText: Your data is stored locally on your device and, if enabled, synchronized via your private iCloud account using Apple's CloudKit technology. We do not have access to your iCloud data.
privacySection.thirdPartyText: Keepio uses the following third-party services:
thirdPartyList: Apple CloudKit: For optional iCloud synchronization across your devices
Apple App Store: For processing premium subscription payments
privacySection.thirdPartyNote: We do not share your personal information with any other third parties.
privacySection.analyticsText: Keepio does not use any third-party analytics or tracking services. We do not track your usage or behavior within the app.
privacySection.rightsText: In compliance with GDPR and applicable privacy laws, you have the right to:
rightsList: Access your data at any time within the app
Delete all your data directly from the app
Disable iCloud synchronization via your iOS Settings
Request information about your data by contacting us
privacySection.childrenText: Keepio does not knowingly collect information from children under 13. The app is designed for general audiences.
privacySection.securityText: We take reasonable measures to protect your data. All data synchronized via iCloud is encrypted using Apple's security protocols.
privacySection.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes through the app or our website.
privacySection.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: contact{'@'}keepio.fr
